# 📦 MNPP Vendor & Global Sources

This directory tracks the external high-performance modules that have been analyzed and integrated into MNPP Mega-Builds.

## 🚀 Assembly Logic Sources

| Project | Build Contribution | Key Logical Gem |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **[Rapid-MLX](https://github.com/raullenchai/Rapid-MLX)** | Speed Demon | Continuous Batching & OpenAI-Compat |
| **[omlx](https://github.com/jundot/omlx)** | Memory Whisperer | Tiered SSD/RAM KV Caching |
| **[lightning-whisper-mlx](https://github.com/mustafaaljadery/lightning-whisper-mlx)** | Multimodal Sonic | Batched STT Decoding Blocks |
| **[f5-tts-mlx](https://github.com/lucasnewman/f5-tts-mlx)** | Multimodal Sonic | Fast Flow-matching TTS Kernels |
| **[BitNet-MLX](https://github.com/adi-dhulipala/mlx-bitnet-mingpt)** | Memory Whisperer | Ternary Weight BitLinear logic |

## 🛠 Integration Status
- [x] **Logic Extraction**: Identifying core performance blocks.
- [ ] **Kernel Fusion**: Injecting MNPP Fused Kernels into vendored logic.
- [ ] **Benchmarking**: Validating vendored logic + MNPP kernels.
